title: FabricatedBoxProfile
description: FabricatedBoxProfile: Rectangular hollow profile that allows for different thicknesses of the webs, top flange and bottom flange.

Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Full width between the extreme fibres of the webs. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

TopFlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BotFlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WeldSize.description: Fillet weld size between inside of webs and flanges. Measured as the distance between intersection of web and flange perpendicular to the edge of the weld. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
